title: Cotranscriptional RNA chemical probing data for ZTP, fluoride, and ppGpp riboswitches
author: Szyjka, Courtney E.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Cotranscriptional RNA chemical probing data for the  Clostridium beijerinckii pfl  ZTP riboswitch,  Bacillus cereus crcB  fluoride riboswitch, and  Clostridiales bacterium oral taxon  876   str. F0540 ppGpp riboswitch. Data were generated using the Transcription Elongation Complex RNA structure probing-multilength (TECprobe-ML) and single length (TECprobe-SL) procedures.
steps_raw: Cotranscriptional RNA chemical probing data for the  Clostridium beijerinckii pfl  ZTP riboswitch,  Bacillus cereus crcB  fluoride riboswitch, and  Clostridiales bacterium oral taxon  876   str. F0540 ppGpp riboswitch. Data were generated using the Transcription Elongation Complex RNA structure probing-multilength (TECprobe-ML) and single length (TECprobe-SL) procedures.
